icon_large.prompt: Create a polished app skill icon for 'Video Overview Generator'. Square 1024x1024. Abstract mark only, no readable text. Show a clean storyboard frame grid blended with a subtle audio waveform and a small play triangle, suggesting narrated static-image overviews assembled from documents. Use #2563EB as the dominant accent with white, near-black, and a small cyan highlight. Modern, premium, simple, high contrast, crisp edges, suitable for a Codex skill icon. No letters, no words, no watermark, no photorealism.

icon_small.prompt: Create a simplified app skill icon for 'Video Overview Generator'. Square 512x512. Abstract mark only, no readable text. A single storyboard rectangle, audio waveform, and play triangle combined into one clear symbol. Use #2563EB as the dominant accent with white and near-black. Crisp, minimal, legible at small size. No letters, no words, no watermark.

icon_wide.prompt: Create a wide 16:9 banner image for a skill called 'Video Overview Generator'. No readable text. Show an elegant sequence of static image frames along a timeline with a clean audio waveform underneath, suggesting a document-grounded narrated overview. Use #2563EB as the dominant accent with white, near-black, and subtle cyan highlights. Premium software-tool aesthetic, clean depth, no characters, no logos, no watermark.
